title: Re-Fabricated Horizons
description:
A small but fast modpack around being a difficult tech modpack

doctor4t's mods are included to add a Vanilla+ feel

I dont own any of these mods
body:
Re-Fabricated Horizons is a Tech/Vanilla+ pack that aims to make the world feel real by any means necessary. 

That includes not being able to punch trees. 

But not all of it is realistic, Enchancement by MoriyaShiine is in here making it so you don't need to worry about things like durability and mending.

I do not own any of these mods so check out their makers as they have a ton of determination and skill that I do not possess, seriously check them out.


LINKS FOR SOME MODS:

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blast

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/illuminations

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/effective

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pick-your-poison
